General.Name: Pinestone Capital Ltd
General.Description: Pinestone Capital Limited, an investment holding company, provides bespoke financial services to individual and corporate clients in Hong Kong. The company offers securities brokerage services; securities-backed lending services, such as margin financing, and money lending and other secured lending services; and placing and underwriting services. Pinestone Capital Limited was incorporated in 2015 and is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.

2.Name: Mr. Kin Kee  Au ACIS, ACS
2.Title: Director of Finance & Company Secretary
